headlines.headline: Zelval Energy names new head of cloud infrastructure division

sentiment.reasoning: The appointment of a new division head is a standard operational change with no immediate or clear financial impact without further context on the individual's reputation or strategic shift.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
